verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There is peace in Christ When we learn of Him Feel the love He felt for us When He bore our sins Listen to His words Let them come alive If we know Him as He is There is peace in Christ

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He give us hope When hope is gone He give us strength When we can't go on He give us shelter In the storms of life When there's no peace on earth There is peace in Christ

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There is peace in Christ When we walk with him Through the streets of Galilee to Jerusalem Mend the broken hearts Dry the tear-filled eyes When we live the way He lives There is peace in Christ

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: He give us hope When hope is gone He give us strength When we can't go on He give us shelter In the storms of life When there's no peace on earth There is peace in Christ When there's no peace on earth There is peace in Christ
